This task is the next product-owner REQUEST_CHANGES UX recovery step: make the first screen explain player identity, current season/date, current strategic problem, and one recommended next action within ten seconds without opening extra panels.

All player-visible text must use existing i18n boundaries and UI must continue using read models / existing command preview and confirmation flows.
risks: M7 content lock remains blocked until the broader UX recovery chain and validation complete.
